title: Parish governing authority to manage parish funds
doc_html:
§502.  Parish governing authority to manage parish funds

The parish governing authority of the parish shall have the control and management of the funds set apart by the parish governing authorities in accordance with this Part.
doc_text:
§502.  Parish governing authority to manage parish funds
The parish governing authority of the parish shall have the control and management of the funds set apart by the parish governing authorities in accordance with this Part.
